welcome.message:
👋 Hello {member}, welcome to our server!

⚠️ **Important:** Your character **MUST** be visible in the official server ranking (Top 1000) for the bot to find you and assign roles.

🔄 **Ranking Updates:** The database cache and role assignments refresh daily at **22:00 (EU Server Time)**.

📌 **How to get your roles automatically:**
1️⃣ Use `/register` to open the form and type your in-game name exactly.
2️⃣ Have pilots handling your characters? Grant them roles using `/pilot` (**Limit of up to 4 pilots**).
3️⃣ Need to remove a pilot? Use `/removepilot` and select them from the menu.

Enjoy your stay! 🚀

management.title: 🛠️ Bot Management Panel
management.mainDesc:
Select a category below to manage that system.

**🏗️ Panels** — Reset panels, kick users
**🔒 Reservations** — View/clear Fury/Frenzy reservations
**📢 Channels** — Configure log/event channels
**👥 Players** — Ranking user management
**📋 Logs** — Dispatch daily reports
**💰 Salary** — Manage salary polls
**🎫 Tickets** — Create ticket panel
**🔄 Update** — Git pull and restart
management.mainDescCompact:
Select a category below to manage that system.

**🟢 Active** — System is configured and running
**🔴 Inactive** — System needs configuration
**ℹ️ Status** — Click to view details
management.errorBody:
❌ **Internal error** in management panel.
```
{error}
```
Check the bot console for full details.

panels.title: 🏗️ Panel Management
panels.desc:
**📊 Overview**
• **{total}** total panels
• **{active}** active claims

**Actions:**
• **Reset Panel** — Select a panel to reset to defaults
• **Kick User** — Remove a user from a claim
• **Back** — Return to main menu

reservations.title: 🔒 Reservation Management
reservations.clearConfirm:
⚠️ **Are you sure?**

This will clear **{count}** reservation(s) across Fury and Frenzy in all panels.

This action **cannot be undone** — all reserved slots will be opened for everyone.
reservations.clearDone: ✅ Cleared **{count}** reservation(s). All events are now open.
reservations.clearCancelled: ❌ Clear cancelled. No reservations were changed.

channels.title: 📢 Channel Configuration
channels.bossDone: ✅ Boss spawn alert channel set to <#{channel}>.

logs.title: 📋 Daily Logs

salary.spreadsheetDone: ✅ Spreadsheet ID set to `{id}`. Next export will use this sheet.
salary.reportNoChannel: ❌ No salary channel configured. Set it first via **Set Channel**.
salary.reportDone: 📊 Salary report posted in the configured salary channel!

tickets.done:
✅ **Ticket panel created in this channel!**

Users can now open tickets for support.

players.title: 👥 Player Management
players.desc:
**Actions:**

• **📝 Register** — Open modal to register your character name
• **👤 Pilot** — Add a pilot to your account
• **🗑️ Remove Pilot** — Remove a pilot from your account
• **🔄 Force Sync** — Force sync with official ranking portal

*Use the buttons below or the slash commands directly:*
`/register`, `/pilot @user`, `/removepilot`, `/forcesync`
players.syncConfirm:
⚠️ **Are you sure?**

This will force a **full synchronization** with the official MIR4 ranking portal.

All registered player data (nicknames, clans) will be updated according to the current ranking data.

This may take a few moments.
players.syncProgress:
🔄 **Force sync started...**

Synchronizing with the official ranking portal. This may take a few moments.
players.syncDone: ✅ **Force sync completed!** Player data has been updated from the ranking portal.
players.pilotInfo:
👤 **Add a Pilot**

A pilot is another Discord user who can claim panels on your behalf.

To add a pilot, use the slash command:
➡️ `/pilot @user`

*Replace @user with the Discord member you want to add as a pilot.*
players.removePilotInfo:
🗑️ **Remove a Pilot**

To remove a pilot from your account, use the slash command:
➡️ `/removepilot`

This will open a menu where you can select which pilot to remove.

update.confirm:
⚠️ **Are you sure?**

This will:
1. Pull the latest code from Git
2. Run `npm install`
3. **Restart the bot** via pm2

The bot will be **offline for a few seconds** during restart.

Proceed with the update?
update.progress:
🔄 **Updating bot...**

Pulling latest code and restarting.
